  field Policy.Mutation MutationPolicy
  field Policy.Query QueryPolicy
  field SimpleViewer.UserID string
  field SimpleViewer.UserRoles []string
  field SimpleViewer.UserTenant string
  field TraceEntry.Decision string
  field TraceEntry.Rule string
  method Decision.Error() string
  method Filter.WhereP(...func(*github.com/syssam/velox/dialect/sql.Selector))
  method FilterFunc.EvalMutation(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Mutation) error
  method FilterFunc.EvalQuery(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Query) error
  method Filterable.Filter() Filter
  method MutationPolicy.EvalMutation(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Mutation) error
  method MutationRule.EvalMutation(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Mutation) error
  method MutationRuleFunc.EvalMutation(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Mutation) error
  method Policies.EvalMutation(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Mutation) error
  method Policies.EvalQuery(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Query) error
  method Policy.EvalMutation(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Mutation) error
  method Policy.EvalQuery(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Query) error
  method PolicyProvider.Policy() github.com/syssam/velox.Policy
  method QueryMutationRule.EvalMutation(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Mutation) error
  method QueryMutationRule.EvalQuery(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Query) error
  method QueryPolicy.EvalQuery(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Query) error
  method QueryRule.EvalQuery(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Query) error
  method QueryRuleFunc.EvalQuery(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Query) error
  method SimpleViewer.ID() string
  method SimpleViewer.Roles() []string
  method SimpleViewer.TenantID() string
  method TenantIDer.TenantID() string
  method Viewer.ID() string
  method Viewer.Roles() []string
func AllowMutationOperationRule(github.com/syssam/velox.Op) MutationRule
func Allowf(string, ...any) error
func AlwaysAllowRule() QueryMutationRule
func AlwaysDenyRule() QueryMutationRule
func And(...QueryMutationRule) QueryMutationRule
func ContextQueryMutationRule(func(context.Context) error) QueryMutationRule
func DecisionContext(context.Context, error) context.Context
func DecisionFromContext(context.Context) (error, bool)
func DenyIfNoViewer() QueryMutationRule
func DenyMutationOperationRule(github.com/syssam/velox.Op) MutationRule
func Denyf(string, ...any) error
func HasAnyRole(...string) QueryMutationRule
func HasRole(string) QueryMutationRule
func IsDecision(error) bool
func IsOwner(string) MutationRule
func IsOwnerOnCreate(string) MutationRule
func NewPolicies(...PolicyProvider) github.com/syssam/velox.Policy
func Not(QueryMutationRule) QueryMutationRule
func OnMutationOperation(MutationRule, github.com/syssam/velox.Op) MutationRule
func Or(...QueryMutationRule) QueryMutationRule
func OwnerQueryRule() QueryRule
func RecordTrace(context.Context, string, string)
func Skipf(string, ...any) error
func TenantQueryRule() QueryRule
func TenantRule(string) MutationRule
func TraceFrom(context.Context) []TraceEntry
func ViewerFromContext(context.Context) Viewer
func WithTrace(context.Context) context.Context
func WithViewer(context.Context, Viewer) context.Context
type Decision struct
type Filter interface
type FilterFunc func(context.Context, Filter) error
type Filterable interface
type MutationPolicy []MutationRule
type MutationRule interface
type MutationRuleFunc func(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Mutation) error
type Policies []github.com/syssam/velox.Policy
type Policy struct
type PolicyProvider interface
type QueryMutationRule interface
type QueryPolicy []QueryRule
type QueryRule interface
type QueryRuleFunc func(context.Context, github.com/syssam/velox.Query) error
type SimpleViewer struct
type TenantIDer interface
type TraceEntry struct
type Viewer interface
var Allow *Decision
var Deny *Decision
var Skip *Decision
